title: Voxite
description: An FPS Boost mod designed for maximum render distance and framerate.
body:
Welcome to Voxite!

This is a client side optimization mod that aims to acheive the maximum FPS possible in the newest version of Minecraft. We have noticed how Minecraft's preformance has been getting only worse with the passing years to the point where you NEED mods to get even a smooth experience. We achieve this by using the heavily optimized Sodium renderer, skipping frames that cannot be loaded by your computer, not rendering blocks and entities that are not visible, and much, much more! No LOD's, just pure preformance!

If experiencing problems with the ViaVersion release, use the regular 1.21 release in the "Versions" menu.

Look at these specs!
32 Chunks: 4 FPS (Vanilla) --> 128 FPS (Voxite) 3000% FPS increase
